## Master Plan: Skill Improvement Workflow

The user's mandate requires the full investigation → audit → planning → validation → implementation cycle. Here is the wave structure:

| Wave | Scope | Agents | Mode |
|------|-------|--------|------|
| **Wave 1** | Comprehensive 15-skill quality audit (9-phase checklist) | explore (read-only) | Parallel investigation |
| **Wave 2** | Cross-skill conflict detection + terminology alignment | explore (read-only) | Sequential to Wave 1 |
| **Wave 3** | Master planning — decompose fixes into bounded slices | — | Gate checkpoint |
| **Wave 4** | Sequential fixes (skill by skill) | task agents | Sequential execution |
| **Wave 5** | Verification pass | explore (read-only) | Post-fix validation |
| **Wave 6** | Create hiveminder-operation-guidelines.md | — | Final artifact |

**Dispatching Wave 1 now.** Three parallel investigation slices — each covering 5 skills using the 9-phase quality checklist from `use-hivemind-skill-authoring`. All read-only. No writes.
